name: mosaic
description: AI agent for video editing automation using Mosaic - creates workflows, processes videos, uploads assets, and publishes to social media.

skills.name: Video Workflow Automation
skills.description: Create, configure, and run video editing workflows (Agents) with AI-powered features like captions, music, and audio enhancement.

examples.input: Process this YouTube video with captions: https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
examples.output: Run started. Status: running. Outputs will be available when complete.
examples.description: Running an agent on a YouTube video

examples.output: Found 3 agents: UGC Variants, Podcast Clips, Tutorial Shorts

skills.name: Asset Management
skills.description: Upload and manage video, audio, and image assets for use in agent workflows.

skills.name: YouTube Automation
skills.description: Set up triggers to automatically process new videos from YouTube channels.

examples.output: Added YouTube channel UCBJycsmduvYEL83R_U4JriQ to trigger

skills.name: Social Media Publishing
skills.description: Connect social platforms and publish or schedule posts with media attachments.

examples.input: Post 'Check out our new video!' to LinkedIn and X with the rendered video
examples.output: Post created. Tracking ID: xyz789. Status: posted

skills.name: Account Management
skills.description: Check credit balance, view subscription plans, and purchase credits.

examples.input: How many credits do I have?
examples.output: Balance: 1840 credits. Usage: 660/2500 included. Plan: creator
